'''yadate''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adverbs|adverb]] meaning "[[Wikt:leerily|leerily]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| y-d-zh
|-
! Word class
| [[Adverb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:leerily|leerily]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| yadate
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].[[present]] || [[word:yadate|yadate]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]] || [[word:yadatesher|yadatesher]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:yadatesherĂ«m|yadatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:yadatero|yadatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:yadateshĂ«|yadateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:yadateshĂ«m|yadateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokiyadatero|gokiyadatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokiyadateshĂ«|gokiyadateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiyadateshĂ«m|gokiyadateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:goyadankerom|goyadankerom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goyadankeshĂ«|goyadankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goyadankeshĂ«m|goyadankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:goyadankeya|goyadankeya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:yadaterom|yadaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:yadatemu|yadatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:yadateya|yadateya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokiyadaterom|gokiyadaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiyadatemu|gokiyadatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokiyadateya|gokiyadateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[present]] || [[word:yadadate|yadadate]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:yadadatesher|yadadatesher]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:yadadatesherĂ«m|yadadatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:yadadatero|yadadatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:yadadateshĂ«|yadadateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:yadadateshĂ«m|yadadateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokiyadadatero|gokiyadadatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokiyadadateshĂ«|gokiyadadateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiyadadateshĂ«m|gokiyadadateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:goyadadankerom|goyadadankerom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goyadadankeshĂ«|goyadadankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goyadadankeshĂ«m|goyadadankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:goyadadankeya|goyadadankeya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:yadadaterom|yadadaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:yadadatemu|yadadatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:yadadateya|yadadateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokiyadadaterom|gokiyadadaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiyadadatemu|gokiyadadatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokiyadadateya|gokiyadadateya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[present]] || [[word:yĂŠdĂŠte|yĂŠdĂŠte]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:yĂŠdĂŠtesher|yĂŠdĂŠtesher]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:yĂŠdĂŠtesherĂ«m|yĂŠdĂŠtesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:yĂŠdĂŠtero|yĂŠdĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:yĂŠdĂŠteshĂ«|yĂŠdĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:yĂŠdĂŠteshĂ«m|yĂŠdĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokiyĂŠdĂŠtero|gokiyĂŠdĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokiyĂŠdĂŠteshĂ«|gokiyĂŠdĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiyĂŠdĂŠteshĂ«m|gokiyĂŠdĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-

|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goyĂŠdĂŠnkeshĂ«|goyĂŠdĂŠnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goyĂŠdĂŠnkeshĂ«m|goyĂŠdĂŠnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:goyĂŠdĂŠnkeya|goyĂŠdĂŠnkeya]]
|-

|-

|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:yĂŠdĂŠteya|yĂŠdĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokiyĂŠdĂŠterom|gokiyĂŠdĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiyĂŠdĂŠtemu|gokiyĂŠdĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokiyĂŠdĂŠteya|gokiyĂŠdĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[present]] || [[word:yafdafte|yafdafte]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:yafdaftesher|yafdaftesher]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:yafdaftesherĂ«m|yafdaftesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:yafdaftero|yafdaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:yafdafteshĂ«|yafdafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:yafdafteshĂ«m|yafdafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokiyafdaftero|gokiyafdaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokiyafdafteshĂ«|gokiyafdafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiyafdafteshĂ«m|gokiyafdafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:goyafdafnkerom|goyafdafnkerom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goyafdafnkeshĂ«|goyafdafnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goyafdafnkeshĂ«m|goyafdafnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:goyafdafnkeya|goyafdafnkeya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:yafdafterom|yafdafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:yafdaftemu|yafdaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:yafdafteya|yafdafteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokiyafdafterom|gokiyafdafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiyafdaftemu|gokiyafdaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokiyafdafteya|gokiyafdafteya]]
|}

''76 forms generated.''

== See also ==
